name: Ubiquiti
notes: Consumer Ubiquiti/UI account: passkey supported as a second factor (MFA) only; passwordless first-factor sign-in (FIDO2) is UID Enterprise only, not the general account. Sources: Ubiquiti Community thread (UI staff confirmation, 28 Dec 2024) https://community.ui.com/questions/Passkey-option-not-given-when-signing-into-Unifi-account/f84d5f28-5b26-49f5-a596-6c25b67c26b2
